steps.title: Set up the constraint
steps.content:
Each pull delivers 4–9 liters. If the elephant pulls $n$ times, the total is between $4n$ and $9n$ liters. For 140 liters:
$$4n \le 140 \le 9n$$
Which choice for $n$ satisfies this constraint?

steps.title: Backsolve with the answer choices
steps.content:
Backsolving — testing choice B (15):
${4}(15) = 60$ and ${9}(15) = 135$. Is $60 \le 140 \le 135$? No, because $140 \gt 135$.

Fails. Testing choice C (34):
${4}(34) = 136$ and ${9}(34) = 306$. Is $136 \le 140 \le 306$? Yes!

That confirms C is correct.
